t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)

        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id

t.license_category, t.license_expiration_date, t.license_front_photo_url, t.license_issue_date, t.license_number, t.nationality, t.phone, t.previous_company, t.profile_photo_url, t.rating_average, t.rejection_reason, t.reviewed_at, t.submitted_at, t.updated_at, t.updated_by_user_id, t.user_id, t.years_driving_experience, t.years_with_company, t1.id AS id0, t1.created_at AS created_at0, t1.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id0, t1.deleted_at AS deleted_at0, t1.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id0, t1.is_approved, t1.is_deleted AS is_deleted0, t1.is_system_default, t1.name, t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id

    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id

    LEFT JOIN (

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (

) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id

t.license_category, t.license_expiration_date, t.license_front_photo_url, t.license_issue_date, t.license_number, t.nationality, t.phone, t.previous_company, t.profile_photo_url, t.rating_average, t.rejection_reason, t.reviewed_at, t.submitted_at, t.updated_at, t.updated_by_user_id, t.user_id, t.years_driving_experience, t.years_with_company, t1.id AS id0, t1.created_at AS created_at0, t1.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id0, t1.deleted_at AS deleted_at0, t1.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id0, t1.is_approved, t1.is_deleted AS is_deleted0, t1.is_system_default, t1.name, t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LIMIT 1
) AS s

) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3

) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id

    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id

) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id

        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id

    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    SELECT t.id, t.admin_internal_notes, t.age, t.application_status, t.company_id, t.completed_trips_count, t.created_at, t.created_by_user_id, t.current_address, t.current_city, t.is_company_verified, t.is_deleted, t.is_identity_verified, t.is_insurance_verified, t.is_license_verified, t.is_professional_driver, t.is_vehicle_verified, t.license_back_photo_url, t.rejection_reason, t.reviewed_at, t.submitted_at, t.updated_at, t.updated_by_user_id, t.user_id, t.years_driving_experience, t.years_with_company, t1.id AS id0, t1.created_at AS created_at0, t1.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id0, t1.deleted_at AS deleted_at0, t1.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id0, t1.is_approved, t1.is_deleted AS is_deleted0, t1.is_system_default, t1.name, t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS     FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id

        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id

p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id

    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    SELECT t.id, t.admin_internal_notes, t.age, t.application_status, t.company_id, t.completed_trips_count, t.created_at, t.created_by_user_id, t.current_address, t.current_city, t.is_company_verified, t.is_deleted, t.is_identity_verified, t.is_insurance_verified, t.is_license_verified, t.is_professional_driver, t.is_vehicle_verified, t.license_back_photo_url, t.license_category, t.license_expiration_date, t.license_front_photo_url, t.license_issue_date, t.license_number, t.nationality, t.phone, t.previous_company, t.profile_photo_url, t.rating_average, t.rejection_reason, t.reviewed_at, t.submitted_at, t.updated_at, t.updated_by_user_id, t.user_id, t.years_driving_experience, t.years_with_company, t1.id AS id0, t1.created_at AS created_at0, t1.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id0, t1.deleted_at AS deleted_at0, t1.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id0, t1.is_approved, t1.is_deleted AS is_deleted0, t1.is_system_default, t1.name, t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id

        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id

    LIMIT 1
) AS s

) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

s.payment_methods, s.provider_profile_id0, s.service_types, s.updated_at2, s.updated_by_user_id2, p5.id, p5.created_at, p5.created_by_user_id, p5.day_of_week, p5.deleted_at, p5.deleted_by_user_id, p5.end_time, p5.is_24_hours, p5.is_deleted, p5.provider_profile_id, p5.start_time, p5.updated_at, p5.updated_by_user_id, p6.id, p6.created_at, p6.created_by_user_id, p6.deleted_at, p6.deleted_by_user_id, p6.document_type, p6.file_extension, p6.file_name, p6.file_size_bytes, p6.file_url, p6.is_deleted, p6.is_verified, p6.mime_type, p6.provider_profile_id, p6.updated_at, p6.updated_by_user_id
FROM (
    SELECT t.id, t.admin_internal_notes, t.age, t.application_status, t.company_id, t.completed_trips_count, t.created_at, t.created_by_user_id, t.current_address, t.current_city, t.custom_company_name, t.date_of_birth, t.deleted_at, t.deleted_by_user_id, t.driver_status, t.email, t.emergency_contact_name, t.emergency_contact_phone, t.employment_type, t.full_name, t.gender, t.is_company_verified, t.is_deleted, t.is_identity_verified, t.is_insurance_verified, t.is_license_verified, t.is_professional_driver, t.is_vehicle_verified, t.license_back_photo_url, t.license_category, t.license_expiration_date, t.license_front_photo_url, t.license_issue_date, t.license_number, t.nationality, t.phone, t.previous_company, t.profile_photo_url, t.rating_average, t.rejection_reason, t.reviewed_at, t.submitted_at, t.updated_at, t.updated_by_user_id, t.user_id, t.years_driving_experience, t.years_with_company, t1.id AS id0, t1.created_at AS created_at0, t1.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id0, t1.deleted_at AS deleted_at0, t1.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id0, t1.is_approved, t1.is_deleted AS is_deleted0, t1.is_system_default, t1.name, t1.operating_cities, t1.updated_at AS updated_at0, t1.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id0, p0.id AS id1, p0.brand, p0.child_seat_available, p0.color, p0.created_at AS created_at1, p0.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id1, p0.deleted_at AS deleted_at1, p0.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id1, p0.has_air_conditioning, p0.has_luggage_space, p0.has_wifi, p0.insurance_certificate_url, p0.is_deleted AS is_deleted1, p0.manufacturing_year, p0.model, p0.passenger_seats, p0.pet_friendly, p0.provider_profile_id, p0.registration_certificate_url, p0.registration_number, p0.smoking_allowed, p0.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p0.updated_at AS updated_at1, p0.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id1, p0.wheelchair_accessible, p2.id AS id2, p2.available_cities, p2.created_at AS created_at2, p2.created_by_user_id AS created_by_user_id2, p2.deleted_at AS deleted_at2, p2.deleted_by_user_id AS deleted_by_user_id2, p2.is_deleted AS is_deleted2, p2.languages_spoken, p2.payment_methods, p2.provider_profile_id AS provider_profile_id0, p2.service_types, p2.updated_at AS updated_at2, p2.updated_by_user_id AS updated_by_user_id2
    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    LEFT JOIN (

) AS s

) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id

    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id

    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible

    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id

    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
ORDER BY s.id, s.id0, s.id1, s.id2, v0.id, p5.id

    FROM transport_provider_profiles AS t
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT t0.id, t0.created_at, t0.created_by_user_id, t0.deleted_at, t0.deleted_by_user_id, t0.is_approved, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_system_default, t0.name, t0.operating_cities, t0.updated_at, t0.updated_by_user_id
        FROM transport_companies AS t0
        WHERE NOT (t0.is_deleted)
    ) AS t1 ON t.company_id = t1.id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p.id, p.brand, p.child_seat_available, p.color, p.created_at, p.created_by_user_id, p.deleted_at, p.deleted_by_user_id, p.has_air_conditioning, p.has_luggage_space, p.has_wifi, p.insurance_certificate_url, p.is_deleted, p.manufacturing_year, p.model, p.passenger_seats, p.pet_friendly, p.provider_profile_id, p.registration_certificate_url, p.registration_number, p.smoking_allowed, p.technical_inspection_certificate_url, p.updated_at, p.updated_by_user_id, p.wheelchair_accessible
        FROM provider_vehicles AS p
        WHERE NOT (p.is_deleted)
    ) AS p0 ON t.id = p0.provider_profile_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT p1.id, p1.available_cities, p1.created_at, p1.created_by_user_id, p1.deleted_at, p1.deleted_by_user_id, p1.is_deleted, p1.languages_spoken, p1.payment_methods, p1.provider_profile_id, p1.service_types, p1.updated_at, p1.updated_by_user_id
        FROM provider_services AS p1
        WHERE NOT (p1.is_deleted)
    ) AS p2 ON t.id = p2.provider_profile_id
    WHERE NOT (t.is_deleted) AND t.user_id = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT v.id, v.created_at, v.created_by_user_id, v.deleted_at, v.deleted_by_user_id, v.display_order, v.is_deleted, v.is_primary, v.photo_url, v.updated_at, v.updated_by_user_id, v.vehicle_id
    FROM vehicle_photos AS v
    WHERE NOT (v.is_deleted)
) AS v0 ON s.id1 = v0.vehicle_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p3.id, p3.created_at, p3.created_by_user_id, p3.day_of_week, p3.deleted_at, p3.deleted_by_user_id, p3.end_time, p3.is_24_hours, p3.is_deleted, p3.provider_profile_id, p3.start_time, p3.updated_at, p3.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_working_hours AS p3
    WHERE NOT (p3.is_deleted)
) AS p5 ON s.id = p5.provider_profile_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT p4.id, p4.created_at, p4.created_by_user_id, p4.deleted_at, p4.deleted_by_user_id, p4.document_type, p4.file_extension, p4.file_name, p4.file_size_bytes, p4.file_url, p4.is_deleted, p4.is_verified, p4.mime_type, p4.provider_profile_id, p4.updated_at, p4.updated_by_user_id
    FROM provider_documents AS p4
    WHERE NOT (p4.is_deleted)
) AS p6 ON s.id = p6.provider_profile_id
